name: Italian Spaghetti Sauce

ingredients.item: cans, or 4 cups tomatoes, cut up

method: Sauté garlic and onion in oil until tender, but not brown. Put in water, tomato paste, tomatoes, brown sugar, salt,
pepper, oregano and bay leaf; simmer uncovered 1 hour. If adding meatballs, add after ½ hour of simmering.
Cook spaghetti as per the directions on the package; drain. Discard bay leaf and serve sauce over spaghetti.
(19) Baked Pasta with Broccoli, Olives and Pancetta
A creamy, cheesy, savory, autumnal meal bursting with flavor.
Broccoli and pasta are a classic combo. This is an easy thing to make for when you're looking for something quick
to put together and satisfying at the same time.
